headline: All You Need to Know About Dover (DOV) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: Dover (DOV) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
